puzzle0.title: EVALUATION TIMESTAMP CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered archive record with the correct contradiction.

puzzle1.title: GHOST CREW CORRELATION
puzzle1.description: Match each personnel source with the correct crew count.

event6.text: Maya takes a long time to answer.

event10.text: Of course there was a psych archive.

event12.text: Management couldn't fix the station, but they could absolutely file a report about how calmly we were dying.

event6.text: Which means the archive is either safe... or old enough to pretend.

event0.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - ETHAN HALE
event0.content:
Subject: Ethan Hale
Status: Stable
Risk Level: Low
Recommendation: Active Duty Approved
Evaluator Note: Subject demonstrates strong command resilience under isolation pressure.
Created: 12 April
Linked Incident: Alpha
event0.caption: Recovered psychological evaluation record. Timestamp appears inconsistent.

event7.text: That's generous. I once threatened a printer with decompression.

event9.text: It had been jamming for three weeks.

choice1.text: HALE, DID YOU KNOW ABOUT THIS?

event1.text: A station full of tired people orbiting a dead planet tends to make management nervous.

event7.text: We called it mandatory small talk with a diagnostic form.

event2.text: But that timestamp is wrong. Or someone made it wrong on purpose.

event12.text: And I am running out of patience for purposeful wrongness.

event0.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - MAYA CHEN
event0.content:
Subject: Maya Chen
Status: Stable
Risk Level: Low
Recommendation: Active Duty Approved
Evaluator Note: Subject shows high pattern-recognition ability and repeated resistance to memory suppression protocols.
Created: 12 April
Linked Incident: Alpha
event0.caption: Recovered psychological evaluation record. Note contains memory suppression reference.

event2.text: No. Nobody told us there were memory protocols.

event11.text: I called it noticing when people moved my tools.

event13.text: Owens called it being impossible to surprise.

event1.text: Angry, oxygen-starved, and very close to screaming, but here.

event5.text: If I start spiraling, talk to me like I'm fixing something.

event0.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - NOAH VOSS
event0.content:
FILE NOT FOUND

Archive slot exists.
Record body removed.
Deletion authority: UNKNOWN
Created: 12 April
Linked Incident: Alpha
event0.caption: Recovered empty evaluation slot. Record body removed after creation.
event0.message: [VOSS EVALUATION SLOT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event7.text: Someone made room for Noah Voss in the evaluation archive.

event9.text: Then removed the person and left the chair.

event8.text: For once, I hate how much sense the ghost makes.

event0.text: I don't like taking advice from the thing haunting our radio.

event1.text: But if it wants you to look at timestamps, look carefully. Not obediently. Carefully.

event7.text: Obedience is how you walk into a trap while feeling productive.

event0.title: EVALUATION INDEX
event0.content:
Created: 12 April
Last Modified: 14 April
Verification Status: Valid
Linked Incident: Alpha
Incident Alpha Date: 11 April
Index Conflict: RECORD CREATED AFTER INCIDENT
event0.caption: Recovered archive index showing evaluations were created after Incident Alpha.

event5.text: They evaluated us after the thing they claimed we were stable through.

event4.text: Hale was marked clean after Alpha.

event8.text: The index was created after the incident.

event10.text: Don't make the records prettier than they are.

event6.text: For several seconds, neither Hale nor Maya types.

event2.text: Incident Alpha happened on April 11. I remember the alarm. I remember Hale shouting over the channel.

event7.text: I remember Grant telling everyone to stop moving until he could count heads.

event9.text: I remember Park saying, 'This is a bad time to admit I'm claustrophobic.'

event11.text: Owens told him everyone already knew.

event3.text: Those evaluations did not exist before Alpha.

event4.text: Someone wrote us clean after everything went wrong.

event18.text: They didn't want to know if we were okay.

event20.text: They wanted the file to say we were.

event1.text: Those records were buried for a reason. And before anyone accuses me of being theatrical, this is not theater.

event2.text: This is me trying to keep us alive.

event7.text: You think knowing is always safer.

event12.text: Sometimes knowing is the thing that turns the lights back on in the room you're hiding from.

event0.text: Good. Then help me uncover the truth.

event1.text: And if Hale starts sounding calm again, remember this moment. Calm is his emergency voice.

event5.text: He gets very polite when he's terrified.

event7.text: That's how you know to run.

event1.text: Some truths are dangerous. Not because they hurt to know. Because once you know them, something knows you know.

event7.text: I miss when paranoid was a personality flaw and not a survival method.

event2.title: GHOST CREW COUNT REPORT
event2.content:
OFFICIAL MANIFEST COUNT: 6
RECOVERED MANIFEST LAYER COUNT: 7
ORIGINAL ASSIGNMENT INDEX COUNT: 8

Discrepancy: one person removed from official manifest. One additional person removed from recovered manifest layer.
Visual archive unavailable. Count derived from personnel hashes, suit registry keys and life support allocation records.
event2.caption: Personnel count reconstructed without image records.
event2.message: [GHOST CREW COUNT REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. Six official. Seven recovered. Eight original.

event6.text: And I hate that I can see the shape before I understand what it is.

event8.text: I don't have a memory for that number.

event10.text: But I can feel the room getting bigger around it.

event23.text: If Noah was seven, then someone else was eight.

event3.text: Hale's evaluation says stable after Incident Alpha.

event5.text: Mine says I resisted memory suppression, which no one admitted existed.

event7.text: The index says the archive was created after the incident it pretends to evaluate.

event8.text: Two people were removed from the story at different depths.

event10.text: One removal was sloppy enough to find.
